title: Valkyria Chronicles 4

gpu: X.Org Radeon RX 580 Series (POLARIS10, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.8-arch1-1-ARCH, LLVM 6.0.1)
notes: Finished the game, settings on maximum, works perfectly out of the box.
title: Valkyria Chronicles 4

notes: Runs great with no config tweeks (I just cranked up the graphics settings and set resolution to 4k: perf was still fine) with the exception that changing mouse modes (from relative to absolute) often does not work leading to unusable controls. Alt-tab-ing away from the game and back fixes this issue. In the graphics selecting full screen (instead of the default boarder less full-screen window) could not be disable without relaunching the game. Over 26 hours of play, the audio got corrupted twice which was fixed by going to the title screen and back. Worked fine on my multi-monitor setup (I just played on one scree).
title: Valkyria Chronicles 4

notes: The first map run flawlessly with maximum graphics settings
title: Valkyria Chronicles 4

notes: Disable Esync seems to be required. Choppy audio starts appearing at around 2-3 hours in-game, but can be fixed by saving, then exiting to the main menu and then re-loading the save.
title: Valkyria Chronicles 4
